title: Hardik Pandya ・ Design & product leader
rawContent: Hardik Pandya ・ Design & product leader Skip to main content Hardik Pandya Work Notes Talks Manual Stuff I’m an AI & design leader. Currently SVP of Design, Research & Taste at Pocket FM; before that at Atlassian, Unacademy, Airlearn, Google (Search, Cloud, Photos), Ola, and more. I help startups and large companies build and grow products through design across consumer tech, education, enterprise SaaS, fintech, healthcare, and mobility. Latest notes Notes on product, design and leadership, born out of empirical learnings and everyday observations. Making big things happen Leadership Solari split-flap AI experiments Large companies can't operate at the frontier Leadership Expose your design system to LLMs AI experiments 16 pieces of design wisdom Career Power prompts in Claude Code AI experiments The invisible work Leadership New Claude skill: Stop Slop AI experiments Systems, stables and stars Leadership Exposure Career View all Projects ✨ Iconic A curated collection of photographs from technology, design, craft and filmmaking history. Solari split-flap A faithful recreation of the mechanical airport departure boards. Open source. Stop Slop A Claude Code skill that detects and eliminates AI generated writing patterns from your prose. Vibe Slack A Slack redesign kit built entirely through vibe coding with Cursor. Vibe prototyping Practical lessons from spending 60 hours vibe coding in a month with Cursor. Get in touch I love helping folks with the pursuit of good design cultures, career growth, projects and portfolio guidance. I also enjoy assisting founders with product and design strategy for their business. Say hello anytime. me@hvpandya.com @hvpandya LinkedIn Estd in 2006 · Last updated June 2026 © Hardik Pandya.
